title: Pipedrive vs Salesloft
description: Compare Pipedrive vs Salesloft in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Pipedrive emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Pipedrive or Salesloft?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Pipedrive edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating. Pipedrive excels at Sales-focused CRM for pipeline visualization and deal tracking, while Salesloft is stronger for Sales engagement platform for enterprise revenue teams..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Pipedrive and Salesloft?
faqs.answer: Pipedrive and Salesloft differ in pricing ($14–$99/user/mo vs $75-200/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Pipedrive cheaper than Salesloft?
faqs.answer: Pipedrive starts at $14–$99/user/mo while Salesloft starts at $75-200/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Pipedrive or Salesloft?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. Pipedrive scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Pipedrive and Salesloft together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Pipedrive or Salesloft?
faqs.answer: Both Pipedrive and Salesloft prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Salesloft for large teams, while Pipedrive may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $14–$99/user/mo pricing.
